summary: Planned Phase 2 (Install/Uninstall) of the Skill Marketplace: 10 tasks covering npm-client, tarball extraction, version resolver, bundled-skill collision guard, install command, uninstall command, index.ts wiring, and integration tests.
completed: Phase 1 Foundation (schema, discovery paths, lockfile CRUD)
pending: Task 5: Create bundled skill name list utility (TDD)
Task 9: Integration test for install/uninstall round-trip
Task 10: Verify full test suite and clean up
concerns: Tarball extraction uses system `tar` command via execFileSync -- works on macOS/Linux but may need adjustment for Windows
semver package must be added as a new dependency to packages/cli
Integration test mocks fs globally which can be fragile -- may need adjustment during execution
decisions: Use system `tar` command for extraction instead of adding a tar npm package -- avoids new dependency, universally available on supported platforms
Add `semver` npm package as a dependency rather than implementing custom semver logic -- it is already in the pnpm store as a transitive dep
Install command is a pure `runInstall` function + a thin commander wrapper -- same pattern as update.ts
Uninstall checks dependents via lockfile `dependencyOf` field rather than parsing skill.yaml `depends_on` -- avoids reading files from disk for already-installed skills
Transitive dependency installs re-read the lockfile after each dep install to avoid stale state
